mapper.select:
SELECT d.id AS "drugId", d.drug_code AS "drugCode", d.drug_name AS "drugName", COALESCE(d.specification, d.drug_format) AS "specification", COALESCE(d.category, d.drug_type) AS "category", COALESCE(d.price, d.drug_price) AS "price", d.generic_name AS "genericName", d.instructions AS "instructions", d.contraindications AS "contraindications", d.drug_format AS "drugFormat", d.drug_type AS "drugType", d.drug_price AS "drugPrice" FROM drug_info d
(d.status IS NULL OR d.status = 1)
( d.drug_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.drug_code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.mnemonic_code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(d.generic_name, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
OR
COALESCE(d.generic_name, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
OR
( COALESCE(d.category, d.drug_type, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(d.dosage_form, d.drug_dosage, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
OR
( COALESCE(d.instructions, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.drug_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
LIMIT #{fetchLimit}
